title: Japanese Cashew Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and nutritious Japanese-inspired stir fry made with juicy chicken, crunchy cashews, and a hint of Peruvian spice. Prep in under 30 minutes for a quick and delicious meal!
instructions: Heat 1 tsp sesame oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the juicy chicken breast and cook until browned, about 5-6 minutes.
Add the Peruvian aji amarillo pepper and cook for 1 minute.
Add the stew meat and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the cashews and cook for 1-2 minutes.
In a small bowl, whisk together buttery soy sauce, brown sugar, and rice vinegar.
Pour the sauce over the chicken and cashews, and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
Serve hot, garnished with green onions.
Cook time may vary based on the size and thickness of the chicken breast.
